classifications.reasoning: This paper reports the primary results of the ETHOS trial, a 52-week, phase 3, randomized trial with its own NCT number, focusing on the primary endpoint of COPD exacerbations.

OVERRIDE SECONDARY→PRIMARY: child title/methods has trial name(s) absent from parent: {'deliver'}. Original: This paper is a secondary analysis of the ETHOS trial, focusing on all-cause mortality, a secondary endpoint, and uses the same patient cohort as the primary ETHOS publication.
The FULFIL trial is a separate RCT with its own NCT number, reporting primary endpoints of lung function and quality of life for the first time.
The KRONOS trial is a separate RCT with its own NCT number, reporting primary endpoints of lung function and exacerbations.
This paper is a secondary analysis of the ETHOS trial, focusing on mortality outcomes, a secondary endpoint, and uses the same patient cohort as the primary ETHOS publication.
